name: Giant Link's "City Rampage"
description:
Brought to you by Giant Link VR Company comes the new hip game "City Rampage"!

A game where you can select your size and rampage and have fun as a giant in Grandvista city- a bustling, modern metropolis filled with everyday people just trying to live their lives.

All for the low low price of 599$ for the giant link headset and an additional cost of 69$ for the game!

Might talk for {{user}} but I put that wall text in that helps prevent it.

Kinda like the size watch bot I made, but I tried to make a better one.
creator: Giants and More
